details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist (expected at /workspace/reports/board/). Top-level board/ exists but governance spec requires reports/board/.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing; reports/audit/ present; memory_bank/ has key docs; .cursor/automations/ has README + specs.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory with active code files (sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py) still present in repo. scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot. scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references moltbot. MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md documents moltbot/ as active component. CSA_VERDICT_clawdbot_removal.json (2026-03-05) had verdict HOLD; removal was proposed but not executed.
